\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Global numerical constants, fundamental types, and simple macros. 

This header is included broadly across the project to provide\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Fundamental {\bfseries{typedefs}} for complex numbers and 3‑vectors.
\item Physical {\bfseries{constants}} (pi, i, c0, epsilon0, mu0, Z0).
\item Minimal geometric {\bfseries{tags}} (FRONT/\+BACK) used for triangle orientation.
\end{DoxyItemize}

Keep this header lean\+: do {\bfseries{not}} put run‑time configuration, wavelengths, or any domain‑specific variables here. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_source}{globals.\+h}}.
